How to Write a Perfect New Baby Card

30 real new baby messages you can copy-paste today. 5 pro writing tips from our card editors. Bad-vs-good comparisons so you can spot the generic stuff and write something they'll actually remember.

📝 30 copy-paste messages 💡 5 writing tips ✅ Bad vs Good examples ❓ FAQs answered
Jump to: 30 Messages 5 Writing Tips Bad vs Good FAQ Pick a New Baby Template

1 30 New Baby Messages You Can Steal Today

Click 📋 Copy to save to clipboard. Click 🎴 Use on a card to open a new baby template with this message ready to go.

01 ✍️ General
👶🍼 Congratulations on your new baby! Welcome to the world, little one.
🎴 Use on a card
02 ✍️ General
So excited for your growing family! Huge congratulations on the new arrival. 🎀💙
🎴 Use on a card
03 ✍️ General
Huge congrats on your new baby boy/girl. Parenthood suits you already. 💗✨
🎴 Use on a card
04 ✍️ General
Congratulations! Can't wait to snuggle that tiny human. 🤱💞
🎴 Use on a card
05 ✍️ General
Welcome to parenthood: the most beautiful chaos you'll ever know. Congratulations! 🍼💕
🎴 Use on a card
06 ✍️ General
Baby + you = perfect family. So happy for you! 👨👩👧💙
🎴 Use on a card
07 👩 For Her
Congratulations, Mommy-to-be/new Mommy! You're already doing amazing. 💪💖
🎴 Use on a card
08 👩 For Her
To my beautiful friend on her baby shower/birthday of baby — so happy for you! 🌸💕
🎴 Use on a card
09 👩 For Her
You made a tiny human and she's perfect. Congratulations, Mommy. 👶💗
🎴 Use on a card
10 👩 For Her
Welcome to Mommyhood! It's messy, loud, and absolutely the best. Congratulations. 💙
🎴 Use on a card
11 👩 For Her
To the new mom — you're stronger than you know. Congratulations! 🌟💖
🎴 Use on a card
12 👩 For Her
Baby girl is as beautiful as her mama. Congratulations, gorgeous. 💐💕
🎴 Use on a card
13 👨 For Him
Congratulations, Daddy! Baby boy/girl already has your eyes/smile. 😊💙
🎴 Use on a card
14 👨 For Him
To the new dad — get ready for a lifetime of dad jokes. You're gonna crush it. 👔🍼
🎴 Use on a card
15 👨 For Him
Congratulations on your new baby! Fatherhood looks great on you. 💪✨
🎴 Use on a card
16 👨 For Him
Welcome to Dad life, buddy. Coffee will become your best friend. ☕😂💙
🎴 Use on a card
17 👨 For Him
So happy for you, man. You're gonna be the best dad ever. 🏆👶
🎴 Use on a card
18 👨 For Him
Huge congratulations, new Dad! Enjoy every sleepy snuggle. 💙🧸
🎴 Use on a card
19 👨👩👧 Family
Congratulations to my sister/brother on becoming a parent! The baby is so loved already. 💗👶
🎴 Use on a card
20 👨👩👧 Family
To our new niece/nephew: welcome to the family! And congrats to the parents. 🎀💙
🎴 Use on a card
21 👨👩👧 Family
Congratulations, Grandma/Grandpa! So excited for you to spoil this little one rotten. 🍬👴👵
🎴 Use on a card
22 👨👩👧 Family
My cousin had a baby! Congratulations to the whole family. New human alert! 🎉👶
🎴 Use on a card
23 👨👩👧 Family
Congratulations to my daughter/son on your new family. 💖✨👶
🎴 Use on a card
24 👨👩👧 Family
To the whole family on this new blessing — huge congratulations! 💛🙏
🎴 Use on a card
25 👯 Friends
Bro! You're a dad! So happy for you and the family. Let's celebrate soon! 🍻👶
🎴 Use on a card
26 👯 Friends
Bestie! Your baby is perfect. Congratulations, Mama. I'm already planning playdates. 🌈💞
🎴 Use on a card
27 👯 Friends
Congratulations! I'm Aunty/Uncle now, right? Title is non-negotiable. 😂👑👶
🎴 Use on a card
28 👯 Friends
OMGGGG CONGRATS ON BABY!!! I'm literally crying happy tears. So happy for you two! 😭💗💙
🎴 Use on a card
29 👯 Friends
Huge congratulations, friend! Parenthood suits you. Next pizza night: you pick, I bring diapers. 🍕🍼💞
🎴 Use on a card
30 👯 Friends
You made a human! And it's adorable. Congratulations, you guys are gonna crush this. 🥳👶
🎴 Use on a card

2 5 Pro Tips for Writing New Baby Cards That Get Saved

After editing 10,000+ greeting cards, these are the 5 patterns that separate "nice" cards from "I kept this on my fridge for 3 years" cards.

  1. 💡 Congratulate the PARENTS first, then welcome the baby.
  2. 💡 Acknowledge the mess ('Sleep is now a myth… but SO worth it').
  3. 💡 Offer a specific, actionable favour ('I'll drop dinner off Tuesday').
  4. 💡 Avoid 'enjoy every moment' — new parents hate that phrase.
  5. 💡 If gender reveal, lean into it softly, not stereotypically.

3 Bad vs Good: New Baby Card Messages, Side by Side

The difference between a forgotten card and a remembered one is usually 2 specific sentences. Here's what that looks like in practice.

❌ Don't write this
Congrats on the new baby!
✅ Write this instead
Congratulations on Zoe! She has your nose (sorry, Jamie) and the loudest lungs I've ever heard. Parenthood suits you. 👶🍼
❌ Don't write this
Enjoy every moment!
✅ Write this instead
Ignore the "enjoy every moment" people. Survive today. Order the Uber Eats. Accept the help. You're doing amazing.
❌ Don't write this
So happy for you two!
✅ Write this instead
So happy for you — and if you ever need someone to babysit for 2 hours so you can take a NAP, call me. I'm there.

4 New Baby Card Writing — FAQ

The questions we get asked 4–5 times a week about writing new baby cards.

Should I comment on their labour/parenting skills?

No. Don't say "hope it was easy" (it wasn't) or "you'll be great" (they're terrified). Just celebrate the baby + support the parents.

What about "sleep now before the baby comes"?

Skip it. Every pregnant person has heard it 10,000 times. It's not cute; it's annoying.

Is it okay to give unsolicited parenting advice?

ABSOLUTELY NOT. Unless the card starts with "You asked for this…" — keep all advice to yourself.

Second, third baby — do I still send a card?

YES. Every baby is a celebration. The older kids love seeing themselves named in a card too.

5 Pick a New Baby Template & Send in 60 Seconds

All templates are free to design, personalise, and preview. No account needed.
